items.title: An options trade that hedges risk on this consumer stock trading at a discount
items.description: Michael Khouw breaks down this options trade on KVUE.

items.title: U.S. crude oil touches highest level since June 2025 after Iran says it attacked a tanker
items.description: Oil prices have surged about 15% this week as the U.S.-Iran war engulfs the Middle East.

items.title: BMO upgrades this plastics manufacturer as Middle East conflict disrupts global supply
items.description: BMO Capital Markets believes that ramping Middle East tensions could boost this stock's pricing power.

items.title: Bank of America upgrades Tesla, calls it the clear leader in autonomous driving
items.description: Tesla's advances in autonomous driving and robotaxi services could drive its next phase of growth, Bank of America said.

items.title: Loop Capital thinks this chip manufacturer could more than double on an AI ‘super cycle’
items.description: Loop Capital sees shares of Astera Labs rising 120% from here.
